scripts.build: vite build --outDir dist/client && vite build --ssr src/entry-server.ts --outDir dist/server
scripts.build:cf: npm run build && npm run prerender
scripts.build:cf:cms: npm run build && npm run pull:cms-content && CMS_CONTENT_FILE=.cms/site-content.json npm run prerender
scripts.deploy:cf:prod:seed: npm run build:cf && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/client --project-name himahlini --branch main --env-file .env
scripts.deploy:cf:prod:cms: npm run build:cf:cms && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/client --project-name himahlini --branch main --env-file .env
scripts.deploy:cf:preview:seed: npm run build:cf && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/client --project-name himahlini --branch preview --env-file .env
scripts.deploy:cf:preview:cms: npm run build:cf:cms && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/client --project-name himahlini --branch preview --env-file .env
